settings.text: We're a small team of indoor cat parents who know the feeling all too well.

Every morning, the same look. Those eyes at the window as you leave for work. Your cat is safe indoors — but is she happy? Is she stimulated? We asked ourselves that question one too many times.

We tried every toy on the market. Most ended up forgotten under the sofa within a week. What indoor cats actually need is something that moves, surprises, and engages their hunting instincts — without needing a human on the other end.

That's how the Pawly Ball was born. A simple, smart toy that plays with your cat so you don't have to feel guilty when life gets busy.

We believe every indoor cat deserves enrichment — even when their favourite human isn't around. Pawly exists to give your cat the stimulation they need, and give you the peace of mind you deserve.

One product. One purpose. Happy cats, guilt-free owners.
